name: party-supply-agent
_awsSdkPinning: Keep all @aws-sdk/client-* on a single exact version to avoid @smithy/core version skew. Under `^3.700.0`, npm resolves each client to its latest patch independently; a newer client (e.g. client-ssm) can end up importing exports (`makeBuilder`) from an older hoisted @smithy/core that another client pulled in, throwing 'makeBuilder is not a function' at agent startup. Bump every @aws-sdk/client-* + lib-* in lockstep when updating.
